basic_details.job_title: ECHS Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 10 Medical Officer, Peon and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Medical Officer, Peon and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Ex-Servicemen Contributory Health Scheme (ECHS) Medical, Para Medical & Non-Medical Staff Notification 2026 has been released on the official website. A total of 10 vacancies have been announced through the ECHS Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: MD/MS in specialty concerned/ DNB, MBBS, BDS, BSc Nursing/ GNM diploma/ Class I Nursing Assistant course (Armed Forces), Literate, Class 8 or GD trade for Armed Forces
qualification.details: Medical Specialist: MD/MS in specialty concerned/ DNB, Minimum 03 years experience in the subject concerned after Post Graduation. Medical Officer: MBBS, Minimum 03 years experience after internship. Preferable additional qualification in medicine/surgery. Dental Officer: BDS, Minimum 03 years experience after internship. Preferable merit in BDS/ PG/ additional qualification. Nursing Assistant: BSc Nursing/ GNM diploma/ Class I Nursing Assistant course (Armed Forces). Minimum 05 years work experience. Safaiwala: Literate with minimum 05 years work experience. Peon: Class 8 or GD trade for Armed Forces with minimum 05 years work experience.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ECHS Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: echs.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 16-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for ECHS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the ECHS recruitment is 16th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in ECHS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 10 vacancies announced for various Medical, Para Medical, and Non-Medical Staff positions under the Ex-Servicemen Contributory Health Scheme.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for ECHS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and send it to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary structure for the ECHS posts?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 21,800.00 to Rs. 1,30,000.00 per month, depending on the post and qualifications. Specific details are available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q5. What are the eligibility criteria for the Medical Specialist post?
faq.answer: For the Medical Specialist post, candidates must possess an MD/MS in the specialty concerned or DNB, along with a minimum of 03 years of experience after post-graduation.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for ECHS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for ECHS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process for the advertised posts will be based on an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted and called for an interview based on their applications.

faq.question: Q8. What is the minimum qualification for the Safaiwala post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification for the Safaiwala post is being literate, along with a minimum of 05 years of work experience in a relevant field.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I download the application form for ECHS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of ECHS, which is echs.gov.in. It is advisable to check the official notification for the exact link or instructions.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required to be attached with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates are required to attach self-attested copies of necessary documents, including a photograph, signature, ID proof, and relevant educational and experience certificates, as specified in the official notification.
